prompt_task: You are given paired-end RNA sequencing FASTQ files (gene.fusion.q1.R1.fq.gz, gene.fusion.q1.R2.fq.gz) from human. The data contains a synthetic gene fusion event. Your task is to identify the fusion genes. Report the answer as the names of the two genes joined by a hyphen, with the 5′ partner first and the 3′ partner second, written in all uppercase letters, HGNC symbols. For example: TCF21-COL1A1. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
